commands.name: query-packet
commands.description: Create a bounded dry-run Reef API/database packet.

commands.name: query-packet-live
commands.description: Create a bounded live Reef API/database packet with explicit network execution.

evidence_boundary.can_support: protein accession, reviewed/unreviewed status, sequence/function annotation provenance
evidence_boundary.cannot_support_alone: new function, mechanism, causality, or clinical utility without primary evidence
